mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, role, status, nickname, avatar_url, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mentalhealth_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mentalhealth_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM mentalhealth_user
deleted = 0
AND role = #{role}
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mentalhealth_user (username, password_hash, role, status, nickname, avatar_url, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{status}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE mentalhealth_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE mentalhealth_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
